    Plugin author or organization

    dependencies() - Element in annotation interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.annotation.Plugin
    IDs of plugins this plugin depends on

    Extension description

    Extension point description
    description() - Element in annotation interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.annotation.Plugin
    Plugin description
    description() - Method in record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginMetadata
    Returns the value of the description record component.

    destroy() - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.Plugin
    Destroys the plugin and releases all resources.

    E

    equals(Object) - Method in record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginDescriptor
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginMetadata
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    Extension - Annotation Interface in org.fireflyframework.plugin.annotation
    Marks a class as an implementation of an extension point.
    ExtensionPoint - Annotation Interface in org.fireflyframework.plugin.annotation
    Marks an interface as an extension point that plugins can implement.
    extensionPointId() - Element in annotation interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.annotation.Extension
    ID of the extension point this implements
    ExtensionRegistry - Interface in org.fireflyframework.plugin.api
    Registry for managing extension points and their implementations.

    F

    FAILED - Enum constant in enum class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginState
    Plugin encountered an error

    G

    getAllPlugins() - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginManager
    Gets all loaded plugins.
    getExtension(String) - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.ExtensionRegistry
    Gets the highest priority extension for an extension point.
    getExtensionPointIds() - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.ExtensionRegistry
    Gets all registered extension point IDs.
    getExtensionRegistry() - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginManager
    Gets the extension registry.
    getExtensions(String) - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.ExtensionRegistry
    Gets all extensions for an extension point, ordered by priority (highest first).
    getId() - Method in record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginDescriptor
     
    getMetadata() - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.Plugin
    Gets the metadata for this plugin.
    getName() - Method in record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginDescriptor
     
    getPlugin(String) - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginManager
    Gets a plugin by its ID.
    getPluginDescriptor(String) - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginManager
    Gets a plugin descriptor by plugin ID.
    getVersion() - Method in record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginDescriptor
     

    H

    hasExtensionPoint(String) - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.ExtensionRegistry
    Checks if an extension point is registered.
    hashCode() - Method in record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginDescriptor
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hashCode() - Method in record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginMetadata
    Returns a hash code value for this object.

    I

    id() - Element in annotation interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.annotation.ExtensionPoint
    Unique extension point ID

    Unique plugin ID

    Returns the value of the id record component.

    initialize() - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.Plugin
    Initializes the plugin.
    initialize() - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginManager
    Initializes the plugin manager.
    INITIALIZED - Enum constant in enum class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginState
    Plugin has been initialized

    Returns the value of the lastStateChange record component.

    Plugin is loaded but not yet initialized

    Returns the value of the loadedAt record component.

    O

    org.fireflyframework.plugin.annotation - package org.fireflyframework.plugin.annotation

    P

    Plugin - Interface in org.fireflyframework.plugin.api
    Core interface that all plugins must implement.
    Plugin - Annotation Interface in org.fireflyframework.plugin.annotation
    Marks a class as a Firefly plugin.
    PluginDescriptor - Record Class in org.fireflyframework.plugin.model
    Complete descriptor of a plugin including its metadata and current state.
    PluginDescriptor(PluginMetadata, PluginState, Instant, Instant) - Constructor for record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginDescriptor
    Creates an instance of a PluginDescriptor record class.
    PluginDescriptor.Builder - Class in org.fireflyframework.plugin.model
     
    PluginException - Exception Class in org.fireflyframework.plugin.api
    Base exception for plugin-related errors.
    PluginException(String) - Constructor for exception class org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginException
     
    PluginException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginException
     
    PluginException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception class org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginException
     
    PluginManager - Interface in org.fireflyframework.plugin.api
    Main interface for managing plugins.
    PluginMetadata - Record Class in org.fireflyframework.plugin.model
    Metadata information about a plugin.
    PluginMetadata(String, String, String, String, String, Set) - Constructor for record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginMetadata
    Creates an instance of a PluginMetadata record class.
    PluginMetadata.Builder - Class in org.fireflyframework.plugin.model
     
    PluginState - Enum Class in org.fireflyframework.plugin.model
    Represents the lifecycle state of a plugin.
    priority() - Element in annotation interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.annotation.Extension
    Priority (higher values = higher priority)

    R

    registerExtension(String, T) - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.ExtensionRegistry
    Registers an extension with default priority (0).
    registerExtension(String, T, int) - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.ExtensionRegistry
    Registers an extension implementation.
    registerExtensionPoint(String, Class) - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.ExtensionRegistry
    Registers an extension point.

    S

    shutdown() - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginManager
    Shuts down the plugin manager and all plugins.
    start() - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.Plugin
    Starts the plugin.
    STARTED - Enum constant in enum class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginState
    Plugin is running
    startPlugin(String) - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginManager
    Starts a plugin by its ID.
    state() - Method in record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginDescriptor
    Returns the value of the state record component.
    state(PluginState) - Method in class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginDescriptor.Builder
     
    stop() - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.Plugin
    Stops the plugin.
    STOPPED - Enum constant in enum class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginState
    Plugin has been stopped
    stopPlugin(String) - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginManager
    Stops a plugin by its ID.

    T

    toString() - Method in record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginDescriptor
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginMetadata
    Returns a string representation of this record class.

    U

    unloadPlugin(String) - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.PluginManager
    Unloads and destroys a plugin.
    unregisterExtension(String, T) - Method in interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.api.ExtensionRegistry
    Unregisters an extension.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginState
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginState
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    version() - Element in annotation interface org.fireflyframework.plugin.annotation.Plugin
    Plugin version (semantic versioning recommended)
    version() - Method in record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginMetadata
    Returns the value of the version record component.
    version(String) - Method in class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginMetadata.Builder
     

    W

    withState(PluginState) - Method in record class org.fireflyframework.plugin.model.PluginDescriptor
    Creates a new descriptor with an updated state.
